# Soulo Full Context

Last updated: 2026-04-16

## Overview

Soulo is an iOS search aggregation app. It provides one interface for searching across 40+ global platforms, including classic search engines, AI search tools, video sites, social platforms, shopping platforms, and developer communities.

The public website at `https://soulo.dkluge.com/` is a product landing page. It is public, requires no login, and exposes its main content directly in HTML.

## Core Product Summary

- Soulo supports multi-platform search from one query.
- Supported platform categories include search, video, shopping, social, AI, and developer tools.
- The app supports AI-oriented search engines such as DeepSeek, Perplexity, Phind, and You.com.
- The app supports voice search and multiple interface languages.
- Users can add custom search platforms if the target site supports URL-based search.
- The app includes ad blocking inside its in-app browser experience.
- The app can batch import movie-resource and book-resource search sites.

## Privacy Summary

Soulo is privacy-first. According to the public privacy policy:

- Soulo does not operate backend servers for user accounts, analytics, or telemetry.
- Search queries are opened directly in the selected platform inside the app's WebView.
- Search history, bookmarks, platform configuration, and user preferences are stored locally on the device.
- Optional iCloud sync, when enabled by the user, uses Apple's iCloud services.
- Voice search, OCR, language detection, and similar intelligence features are handled with on-device Apple frameworks.

## Primary Public URLs

- Home: https://soulo.dkluge.com/
- Privacy Policy: https://soulo.dkluge.com/privacy.html
- robots.txt: https://soulo.dkluge.com/robots.txt
- sitemap.xml: https://soulo.dkluge.com/sitemap.xml
- llms.txt: https://soulo.dkluge.com/llms.txt

## Preferred Short Description

Soulo is a privacy-first iOS app that aggregates search across 40+ global platforms, including search engines, AI tools, video sites, shopping sites, and developer communities.
